title: Typing-speed-test
description: A typing speed test application that measures words per minute (WPM) and accuracy in real time. Built with Vanilla JavaScript and Tailwind CSS, it features a live timer, dynamic word generation, and instant performance feedback after each session.

title: Create Your Website - Landing Page
description: A responsive landing page for a website builder platform, built with ReactJS, SCSS, and Bootstrap. Features smooth UI sections including hero, features, pricing, and testimonials, with clean component-based architecture.

title: E-Commerce
description: A fully responsive e-commerce web application built with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and JavaScript. Features a product catalog, shopping cart, category filtering, and a clean checkout UI with animated interactions using WOW.js.

title: Travel & explore
description: A travel inspiration website built with HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap. Showcases destinations with rich visuals, travel guides, and activity highlights, featuring smooth scroll animations and a fully responsive layout.

title: Digital Marketing Website
description: A professional digital marketing agency website built with HTML5, SCSS, and Bootstrap. Highlights services like SEO, social media, and PPC advertising through a modern, animated, and fully responsive design.

title: Investments & FinTech
description: A clean and modern FinTech landing page built with HTML5, CSS3, and Bootstrap. Designed to present financial and e-commerce services with a professional layout and smooth scroll animations.

title: Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio landing page built with pure HTML5 and CSS3, no frameworks. Showcases projects, skills, and contact information through a clean, hand-crafted responsive design.

title: Finance Consultation
description: A finance consultation landing page built with HTML5 and CSS3. Designed to present financial planning and investment advisory services with a professional, trustworthy layout and responsive design.

title: Free Movies Online
description: A movie streaming web application built with ReactJS, SCSS, Bootstrap, and Axios. Fetches real-time movie and TV show data from an external API, featuring a dynamic homepage, category browsing, and smooth carousels using Splide.js.
technologies: HTML5, SCSS, Bootstrap, ReactJs, SplideJs, Axios

title: Interior design
description: A luxury interior design landing page for 'VivaDecor', built with HTML5 and CSS3. Features a hero section with key stats (400+ projects, 600+ clients), a services showcase covering lighting, interior, and outdoor design, a 3-step project workflow section, customer testimonials, and a newsletter subscription — all wrapped in an elegant, responsive layout.

title: To Do List
description: A clean and minimal task management app built with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and JavaScript. Allows users to add tasks, mark them as complete, and clear all tasks at once. Features a simple and distraction-free UI focused entirely on productivity and ease of use.

title: Bookmarker
description: A bookmark manager web app built with HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and JavaScript. Users can save their favorite websites by entering a site name and URL, view all saved bookmarks in a structured table, visit any saved site directly, and delete bookmarks — with data persisted using localStorage.

title: Task Management
description: A responsive task management app built with React 18 and Redux Toolkit. Features add, edit, delete, and toggle completion for tasks, priority-based filtering (High / Medium / Low).
